responses: Hello! Welcome to Akshaya Institute of Technology 😊
Akshaya Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, is a reputed engineering college with modern infrastructure, experienced faculty and focus on quality education.

📊 Total Intake Seats:

\
🎓 UG Programs:
\
CSE – 180
ECE – 120
ISE – 60
AI & DS – 60
Agricultural – 60
Mechanical – 60
Total: 540

\
🎓 PG Programs:
\
MTech CSE – 18
MTech VLSI – 18
MBA – 60
Admissions are through KCET (CET Code: E191), COMEDK or management quota. You can apply online or visit the college.
The fee ranges between 50000 to 150000 per year depending on the course.

📊 Placement Details (2025-26):

\
💰 Highest Package: 12 LPA
\
💰 Lowest Package: 2.5 LPA

\
Top Companies:
\
Cloud Built
Basant Technologies
Ocean Link
Inner Circle
NxtSync
Planet
The campus provides labs, smart classrooms, library, WiFi, hostels, transportation, sports and cafeteria.
